POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: -SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $12,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $16,028.55 DAMAGES, $1,950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $317.50 COSTS, $237.06 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,533.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
